creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is not a candidate for FLAVORS.

The only difference is a couple of RUN_DEPENDS, so the content of the package is the same, so no.

In the futures, we will have some sort of "recommends" concept saying that "you might also want to install these".
OPTIONS is the right way to go with the current state of the ports tree.

If you want, you can add a pkg-message saying that "to get graphical visualization of workflows, install graphics/graphviz and graphics/p5-Image-Size."
